rate_assumptions.list1: 25%, annualized as 6/12 of 2018 and full rate from 2019 onward.
rate_assumptions.list2: 25%, annualized as 5/12 of 2018 and full rate from 2019 onward.
rate_assumptions.list3: 10% from Sep 24 2018; 25% from May 10 2019; annualized by active months.
rate_assumptions.list4b: 0 active rate because duties were suspended before taking effect.

caveats: Uses 2017 China import values as fixed HS8-to-NAICS weights.
Uses HTS8-level core lists; product-level exclusions and firm-specific exclusions are not yet incorporated.
Annual rates are approximated by active months, not exact daily exposure.
